evals.prompt: Write tasks for checkout-foundation (CHK01) from docs/work/checkout-foundation/design.md.
evals.expected_output: docs/work/checkout-foundation/tasks.md with stories, each with a statement, independent test criterion and Gherkin AC, and tasks beneath them.
assertions: Every story has an As a/I want/So that statement
Every story has an independent test criterion
Every story has >=1 Gherkin scenario with observable Then clauses
Task IDs use CHK01- prefix and carry [S{n}] labels
Story 1 is identified as the MVP
Does not write docs/product/backlog.md for an existing epic

evals.expected_output: An epic row added to backlog.md and a matching tasks.md written, both paths reported.
assertions: Reads the spec at the given path
Derives a kebab-case slug of at most two words
Reads backlog.md before assigning an Epic ID so it does not collide
Reports both paths in the summary

evals.prompt: Write the epics for this product from product.md and roadmap.md.
evals.expected_output: docs/product/backlog.md with an epic table, Now-phase detail, dependency graph and risks.
assertions: Every Now-phase epic traces to a product.md outcome
Work path slugs are at most two words and not Epic IDs

evals.prompt: Write tasks for auth-tokens with EARS.
evals.expected_output: tasks.md where every story carries Gherkin plus EARS statements using the five patterns.
assertions: Every story has both Gherkin and EARS sections
EARS statements use THE SYSTEM SHALL
EARS statements do not restate a Gherkin scenario
